listening.title: General Directions
listening.texto: In this section of the test, you will have an opportunity to demonstrate your ability to understand conversations and talks in English. There are three parts to this section with special directions for each part.

listening.title: Part A Directions
listening.texto: In part A, you will hear short conversations between two people. After each conversation, you will hear a question about the conversation. The conversations and questions will not be repeated. After you hear a question, read the four possible answers in your test book and choose the best answer.

opciones: (B) She will lend the man her calculator.
(C) The calculator may be under the man’s book.
(D) The man will not have time to find the calculator.
listening.explicacion: La mujer sugiere revisar bajo el cuaderno.

listening.pregunta: 2. What does the man suggest the woman do?
opciones: (C) Find a job for the summer
(D) Take an astronomy course in the summer
listening.explicacion: Sugiere tomar el curso en el verano.

listening.pregunta: 3. What does the woman imply about the man?
opciones: (B) He can use the lab on the weekend.
(C) He will have to repeat the experiment next week.
(D) He forgot to return the key to security.
listening.explicacion: El laboratorio abre los fines de semana.

opciones: (A) He and his parents plan to visit Japan.
(D) The weather can be very cold in some parts of Japan.
listening.explicacion: Sus padres le enviaron la prenda desde Japón.

opciones: (A) She will go to the restaurant with the man.
(B) She will meet the man and his friends later in the evening.
(D) She will not change her original plans.

listening.pregunta: 6. What can be inferred about the man?
opciones: (A) He will register for the conference.
(B) He has nearly completed all his research.
(C) He is not teaching any classes today.
(D) He forgot to return a book to the library.
(B) She doesn’t have any more homework.
(D) She’s not going to the movies.

listening.pregunta: 8. What will the man probably do?
opciones: (A) He will help the woman find her purse.
(B) He will lend the woman some money.
(C) He will pay for the woman’s dinner.
(D) He will take the woman to the bank.
(A) The man can have the woman’s ticket.
(B) He should call the theater for tickets.
(C) She is going to the theater with a friend.
(D) She doesn’t want to go to the theater.
(A) He doesn’t know where the library is.
(B) He doesn’t have a library card.
(C) He will go to the library later.
(D) He forgot to return a book to the library.
(B) She has an appointment with the dentist.
(C) She’s not going to the dentist today.
(D) She doesn’t like going to the dentist.

listening.pregunta: 12. What will the man probably do?
opciones: (A) He will help the woman with her homework.
(B) He will go to the library with the woman.
(C) He will lend the woman his book.
(D) He will return the book to the library for the woman.
(B) She’s going to the library to do research.
(C) She’s not going to do any research today.
(B) He’s not going to the movies.
(C) He’s going to the movies with a friend.
(D) He doesn’t want to go to the movies.
(A) She will go to the concert with the man.
(B) She will meet the man at the concert.
(C) She doesn’t have any tickets for the concert.
(D) She’s not going to the concert.
(A) He’s already seen the art exhibit.
(B) He’s not going to the art exhibit.
(C) He’s going to the art exhibit with a friend.
(D) He doesn’t want to go to the art exhibit.

listening.pregunta: 17. What will the woman probably do?
opciones: (A) She will help the man with his homework.
(B) She will go to the store with the man.
(C) She will lend the man some money.
(D) She will return the man’s book to the library.
(B) He’s going to the library to do research.
(C) He’s not going to do any research today.
(A) She will go to the party with the man.
(B) She will meet the man at the party.
(C) She’s not going to the party.
(D) She doesn’t have an invitation to the party.
(B) He’s not going to the play.
(C) He’s going to the play with a friend.
(D) He doesn’t want to go to the play.

listening.pregunta: 21. What will the woman probably do?
opciones: (A) She will help the man with his project.
(B) She will go to the meeting with the man.
(C) She will lend the man her laptop.
(D) She will return the man’s book.
(B) He’s going to the library to study.
(C) He’s not going to study today.
(A) She will go to the gym with the man.
(B) She will meet the man at the gym.
(C) She’s not going to the gym.
(D) She’s already been to the gym.
(B) He’s not going to the presentation.
(C) He’s going to the presentation with a colleague.
(D) He doesn’t want to attend the presentation.
listening.explicacion: No quiere ir a la presentación.

listening.pregunta: 25. What will the woman probably do?
opciones: (A) She will help the man with his speech.
(B) She will go to the lecture with the man.
(C) She will lend the man her notes.
(D) She will return the man’s files.
(B) He’s going to the office to work.
(C) He’s not going to work today.

(B) She will meet the man at the museum.
(C) She’s not going to the museum.

(C) He’s going to the exhibit with a friend.
(D) He doesn’t want to go to the exhibit.
listening.explicacion: No quiere ir a la exhibición.

listening.pregunta: 29. What will the woman probably do?
opciones: (A) She will help the man with his application.
(B) She will go to the interview with the man.
(C) She will lend the man her pen.
(D) She will return the man’s documents.
(B) He’s going to the library to review.
(C) He’s not going to review today.

listening.title: Part B Directions
listening.texto: In this part of the test, you will hear longer conversations. After each conversation, you will hear several questions. The conversations and questions will not be repeated.

opciones: (A) She will go to the cafe with the man.
(B) She will meet the man at the cafe.
(C) She’s not going to the cafe.
(D) She’s already been to the cafe.
(B) He’s not going to see the documentary.
(C) He’s going to see the documentary with a friend.
(D) He doesn’t want to watch the documentary.

listening.pregunta: 33. What will the woman probably do?
opciones: (A) She will help the man with his translation.
(B) She will go to the lab with the man.
(C) She will lend the man her dictionary.
(D) She will return the man’s book.
(D) Helping the man find a location.

listening.pregunta: 35. What is the purpose of the man's visit?
36. Where is the physics building located?
37. What does the woman suggest the man do?
38. What is the main topic of the talk?
opciones: (B) The life of a famous artist.
(D) The history of local public parks.

listening.title: Part C Directions
listening.texto: In this part of the test, you will hear several talks. After each talk, you will hear some questions. The talks and questions will not be repeated.

listening.pregunta: 39. Why was the park originally created?
opciones: (B) To provide a place for recreation.

listening.pregunta: 40. What happened to the park in the early 1900s?
opciones: (B) It was closed to the public.
(C) It was used for military training.
(D) It was redesigned by a new committee.

listening.pregunta: 41. What will the speaker discuss next?
42. What is the talk mainly about?
43. Why was the stone originally rejected?
44. How do scientists know the animals were on land?
45. What is a possible theory for moving to land?
46. What will the students do next?
47. What is the talk mainly about?
48. What question does it help answer?
listening.explicacion: Cuándo se movieron a la tierra.

structure.pregunta: 1. Based on the premise that light was composed of color, the Impressionists came to the conclusion _____ not really black.
2. _____ a parliamentary system, the prime minister must be appointed on the basis of the distribution of power in the parliament.
3. The boy _____ going to the movies with a friend.
4. Although he was _____ tired, he continued to work on the project.
5. El comité decidió posponer la reunión hasta que _____ información estuviera disponible.
6. By the time the doctor arrived, the patient _____.
7. Neither the manager nor the employees _____ to work overtime this weekend.
8. The instructions given by the teacher were _____ to follow.
9. If I _____ you, I would take the job offer immediately.
10. The company, _____ established in 1990, has branches all over the world.
11. He is interested in _____ more about the culture of ancient civilizations.
12. Not only _____ the concert, but she also met the performers backstage.
13. The more you practice, _____ you will become at speaking the language.
14. Each of the students is responsible for bringing their own materials.
15. Because of the complex nature of the experiment, it took longer than expected.
16. The team won the championship [A] although [B] they had [C] several [D] injured players.
17. This new engine runs [A] more fast [B] than [C] the [D] previous model.
18. If I [A] was [B] you, I [C] would take [D] the opportunity.
19. El científico [A] cuyo [B] descubrimiento [C] cambió [D] la medicina recibió el premio.
20. The professor [A] recommended [B] study [C] the [D] original sources.
21. [A] Neither the manager [B] or the employees [C] were [D] aware of the issue.
22. The [A] information [B] provided in the report [C] are [D] accurate.
23. By next month, the [A] construction crew [B] will be [C] finish [D] the entire bridge.
24. The [A] rare [B] bird [C] is [D] hardly never seen in this part.
25. [A] None of the money [B] were [C] stolen [D] during the robbery.
26. It was [A] such [B] a [C] difficult [D] task that we needed help.
27. They [A] used to [B] live in a [C] small apartment before [D] move.
28. You [A] should [B] consult a [C] specialist before [D] start the treatment.
29. The [A] summit of this [B] mountain is much [C] more high [D] than the other.
30. [A] Do you [B] understand [C] what [D] the instructor explaining?
31. The mail [A] hasn't [B] arrived [C] yet [D] since we waited.
32. We [A] saved some money [B] so that we [C] could [D] travel next summer.
33. The [A] police [B] are [C] investigate [D] the cause of the accident.
34. We [A] won't go [B] unless [C] the weather [D] will improve.
35. The [A] room is [B] enough large [C] to accommodate [D] the guests.
36. It [A] has been [B] snowing [C] for [D] three days without stop.
37. La persona [A] con [B] quien [C] yo [D] hablé fue de gran ayuda.
38. [A] Even though [B] he practiced, he [C] couldn't [D] master the piece.
39. El café estaba [A] tan [B] caliente [C] que [D] me quemé la lengua.
40. They are [A] considering [B] to stop [C] the [D] project.

reading.pregunta: PASSAJE 1: Patrones de asentamiento... 1. What aspect of the U.S. does it mainly discuss?

reading.explicacion: Lo menciona como factor de empuje.
Sinónimo de fuera de lo común.
Mano de obra barata del Sur.

listening.title: Part A Directions

The conversations and questions will not be repeated. After you hear a question, read the four possible answers in your test book and choose the best answer.
